ILD.title: Risk factors for immune checkpoint inhibitor-related interstitial lung disease: a retrospective cohort study.
ILD.authors: Amemiya T, Suzuki H
ILD.summary: ICI治疗前CRP升高和单核细胞增多是免疫相关性间质性肺炎的独立危险因素。
